records.requires: immutable phase-gate records for the exact release SHA with independent approver digests and zero unowned critical or high blockers
protected tenant digests, stable stage assignment, BYO or Drive consent, residency decision, exclusions, and support owner
dashboard input/output digests, exact thresholds, release and stage identity, evidence links, approver digests, and timestamps for every stage
approved observation windows with production SLOs, route and authorization parity, support report, privacy review, and alert delivery
account limits and price revision, signed numeric budgets, usage, provider errors, fallback rate, output drift, duplicate-artifact and billing reconciliation
timed representative rehearsal under 15 minutes proving exact fences, reverse replay, preserved canary writes, reconciled in-flight jobs, legacy health, and independent approval
immutable final manifest plus row, primary and foreign key, field hash, aggregate, policy semantic, sampled API, and replay-checkpoint report with zero unexplained differences

immutable manifest, two independent complete inventories per side, count, bytes, role, SHA-256, media probe, ownership, orphan, duplicate, provenance, and disposition report with zero unexplained differences
signed rollback deadline expiry, legal hold and customer retention decisions, access controls, encryption, source release scope, and independent owner approval
denied write probes for services, clients and credentials plus zero queued, leased, scheduled, retrying, dead-lettered or indeterminate legacy work
capability inventory, replacement health, per-key-ID revocation receipts, old credential denial and audit review without secret values
immutable per-resource checklist covering services, routes, queues, databases, buckets, DNS, jobs, clients, dashboards and runbooks plus post-cutover monitoring
approved before and after invoice or usage baseline, idle resource inventory, deletion receipts, contract disposition and no active dependency
redacted customer impact and support report plus migration retrospective, decision timeline, follow-up owners and immutable release links
